summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Olivia Dante Art Store. Backend APIs 97% passing (32/33 tests). Frontend UI and crypto payment integration fully functional. NOWPayments REAL integration verified with unique BTC addresses per order.

minor_bugs.issue: Product slug 'art-marketplace-120' not found in seeded data (404)
minor_bugs.impact: Test requirement mentions this slug but it doesn't exist in seed_data.py
minor_bugs.note: All other product endpoints working correctly. This is a data seeding issue, not a functional bug.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ root endpoint returns 200
Backend: GET /api/categories returns 11 categories
Backend: GET /api/products returns 24 seeded products
Backend: GET /api/products/{slug} returns product detail
Backend: GET /api/products/{slug}/related returns related items
Backend: GET /api/crypto/currencies returns 6 supported coins (btc, eth, usdttrc20, usdterc20, bnbbsc, ltc)
Backend: GET /api/crypto/estimate returns BTC estimate for USD amount
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates user and returns JWT token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin@oliviadante.com returns admin token
Backend: POST /api/newsletter accepts email subscription
Backend: POST /api/reviews creates review and updates product rating
Backend: POST /api/orders with crypto BTC creates order AND NOWPayments payment with unique address
Backend: Second BTC order generates DIFFERENT unique address (uniqueness confirmed)
Backend: GET /api/orders/{order_number}/payment?sync=true returns payment status
Backend: GET /api/orders/{order_number} returns order with payment
Backend: GET /api/testimonials returns testimonials
Backend: Admin endpoints return 401 without auth token (correct)
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats returns dashboard stats with admin token
Backend: GET /api/admin/orders returns orders list with admin token
Backend: GET /api/admin/customers returns customers with admin token
Backend: GET /api/admin/payments returns crypto payments with admin token
Backend: GET /api/admin/withdrawals returns withdrawals with admin token
Backend: POST /api/admin/products creates new product
Backend: PUT /api/admin/products/{id} updates product
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/products/{id} deletes product
Backend: POST /api/admin/withdrawals creates withdrawal record
Backend: GET /api/admin/export/orders.csv returns CSV export
Backend: POST /api/webhooks/nowpayments accepts webhook payload
Frontend: Homepage loads with hero section (data-testid=home-hero-primary-cta)
Frontend: Homepage displays 11 categories grid
Frontend: Homepage displays featured products section
Frontend: Homepage displays testimonials section
Frontend: Theme toggle (data-testid=theme-toggle) switches between light and dark mode
Frontend: Theme persists across page refresh
Frontend: Category navigation to /shop/watches works
Frontend: Product detail page loads with images, price, Add to cart button
Frontend: Add to cart updates cart count in header
Frontend: Cart drawer (data-testid=cart-drawer) opens and displays items
Frontend: Cart drawer checkout button navigates to /checkout
Frontend: Checkout shipping form accepts input (full_name, email, address1, city, country)
Frontend: Checkout continues to payment step
Frontend: Checkout displays 6 crypto currency options
Frontend: Checkout shows BTC estimate
Frontend: Place order creates order and navigates to /pay/{orderNumber}
Frontend: Payment page displays REAL BTC address (data-testid=payment-wallet-address)
Frontend: Payment page displays QR code (data-testid=payment-qr-code)
Frontend: Payment page displays amount due in BTC (data-testid=payment-amount-due)
Frontend: Payment page displays countdown timer (data-testid=payment-countdown-timer)
Frontend: Payment page displays status pill 'Awaiting Payment' (data-testid=payment-status-pill)
Frontend: Payment page displays 4-step progress tracker
Frontend: Copy address button (data-testid=payment-copy-address-button) works
Frontend: Search box navigates to /shop?q=query
Frontend: Footer newsletter signup submits email

success_percentage.crypto_payment: 100% (NOWPayments REAL integration working with unique addresses)

critical_verifications.nowpayments_integration: VERIFIED - Real API calls creating unique BTC addresses per order
critical_verifications.unique_addresses: CONFIRMED - Two test orders received different BTC addresses (3QLi83i9P4eMznr5CbMLCe5fcirDvr1qCZ vs 3DWukvdXzMgeXoTMkDByUDTV68Kyq9g2qz)
critical_verifications.admin_auth: WORKING - Admin login with admin@oliviadante.com / Admin@123 successful
critical_verifications.crypto_currencies: VERIFIED - All 6 currencies supported (BTC, ETH, USDT-TRC20, USDT-ERC20, BNB, LTC)
critical_verifications.payment_flow: COMPLETE - Full checkout → crypto payment → unique address generation working
critical_verifications.seeded_data: VERIFIED - 24 products, 11 categories, testimonials all loaded

notes: NOWPayments integration is using REAL API key and creating actual payment addresses
Each order generates a unique crypto deposit address as required
Webhook endpoint at /api/webhooks/nowpayments is ready (IPN_SECRET is empty so signature verification is skipped)
Admin panel fully functional with all CRUD operations working
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
The only failed test (art-marketplace-120 product) is a data issue, not a functional bug
